title: Mega Chicken
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/FfALnAHRtZg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds mega-sized chickens that can be ridden, and flown around.

![infographic A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SNukMOpA/images/926c8730042af9d8f7d6c3739d7565cf036abaf4.png)

Start by gathering some golden wheat seeds and growing golden wheat. Golden seeds can be found by growing regular wheat.

Brew a Mega Potion by using the golden wheat to enhance a strength potion. Be sure to use a splash or lingering potion!

Splash it on a chicken and wait!

You can combine a fishing rod and a cake to make a Cake-on-a-stick to guide the chicken around. Right click and look up while riding to launch into the air and fly around!

![infographic B](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SNukMOpA/images/39488aa3ad0c0ea5207c15f725af3181d8e165a3.png)
